commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4d54a576216d5d5c25976c27bd606513c8436a28)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a `repair:pr-intake` CLI that scans an author's open PRs for repair signals, writes repair-only job files, and removes the Codex `--ephemeral` flag from repair workers.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source inspection: the PR writes `repair-pr-` job names while current main preserves only other inbox prefixes, and the PR treats `UNKNOWN` merge state as a repair signal. I did not run the new intake command because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor and maintainer follow-up rather than repair automation because required real behavior proof is missing and the blockers affect the new intake policy.

target.title: Add repair-only PR intake
target.body:
## Summary
- add deterministic repair-only PR intake for open PRs with current objective repair signals
- create repair jobs from failed checks, dirty merge state, changes requested, or unresolved current review threads
- teach repair workers to inspect source PR refs instead of treating source PRs as canonical material

## Pre-publication checks
- checked upstream open PRs before publishing; no existing Jhacarreiro-authored PR covers repair-only intake
- compared open relevant upstream PRs (#250, #251, #253, #274, #281, #164); only file overlap is package.json with #281, both adding different scripts
- rebased on current upstream/main a1f510381f
- sanitized diff for local-only names, paths, hosts, private services, and secrets

## Verification
- pnpm run build:repair
- node --test test/repair/run-worker.test.ts
target.author: jhacarreiro

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
